heading: State and regional plans
label: 426g–1 State and regional plans
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 4 of act , was renumbered section 5 of that act, and was classified to prior to repeal by .Aug. 13, 1946section 426h of this titlePub. L. 104–303

children.text: cooperate with any State in the preparation of a comprehensive State or regional plan for the conservation of coastal resources located within the boundaries of the State;
encourage State participation in the implementation of the plan; and
submit to Congress reports and recommendations with respect to appropriate Federal participation in carrying out the plan.
